---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════ HERO ═══════════════ -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <img src="headshot.jpg" alt="Nefeli Zafeiri" class="hero-photo" />
    <div class="hero-text">
      <h1>Nefeli Zafeiri</h1>
      <p class="subtitle">Business Analytics &nbsp;·&nbsp; Data Strategy &nbsp;·&nbsp; Operations</p>
      <p class="bio">MSBA candidate at the University of Miami with a background in international business, finance, and data analytics. Passionate about translating data into actionable strategy.</p>
      <div class="contact-links">
        <a href="mailto:nefelizafeiri@gmail.com" aria-label="Email">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2.5 3A1.5 1.5 0 0 0 1 4.5v7A1.5 1.5 0 0 0 2.5 13h11a1.5 1.5 0 0 0 1.5-1.5v-7A1.5 1.5 0 0 0 13.5 3h-11Zm0 1h11a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v.19l-6 3.75-6-3.75V4.5a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5Zm-.5 1.86 5.74 3.59a.5.5 0 0 0 .52 0L14 5.86V11.5a.5.5 0 0 1-.5.5h-11a.5.5 0 0 1-.5-.5V5.86Z"/></svg>
          Email
        </a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nefeli-zafeiri" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="LinkedIn">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M0 1.146C0 .513.526 0 1.175 0h13.65C15.474 0 16 .513 16 1.146v13.708C16 15.487 15.474 16 14.825 16H1.175C.526 16 0 15.487 0 14.854V1.146Zm4.943 12.248V6.169H2.542v7.225h2.401Zm-1.2-8.212c.837 0 1.358-.554 1.358-1.248-.015-.709-.52-1.248-1.342-1.248S2.4 3.226 2.4 3.934c0 .694.521 1.248 1.327 1.248h.016Zm4.908 8.212V9.359c0-.216.016-.432.08-.586.173-.431.568-.878 1.232-.878.869 0 1.216.662 1.216 1.634v3.865h2.401V9.25c0-2.22-1.184-3.252-2.764-3.252-1.274 0-1.845.7-2.165 1.193v.025h-.016l.016-.025V6.169h-2.4c.03.678 0 7.225 0 7.225h2.4Z"/></svg>
          LinkedIn
        </a>
        <a href="https://github.com/nefelizafeiri" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="GitHub">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 0C3.58 0 0 3.58 0 8c0 3.54 2.29 6.53 5.47 7.59.4.07.55-.17.55-.38 0-.19-.01-.82-.01-1.49-2.01.37-2.53-.49-2.69-.94-.09-.23-.48-.94-.82-1.13-.28-.15-.68-.52-.01-.53.63-.01 1.08.58 1.23.82.72 1.21 1.87.87 2.33.66.07-.52.28-.87.51-1.07-1.78-.2-3.64-.89-3.64-3.95 0-.87.31-1.59.82-2.15-.08-.2-.36-1.02.08-2.12 0 0 .67-.21 2.2.82.64-.18 1.32-.27 2-.27.68 0 1.36.09 2 .27 1.53-1.04 2.2-.82 2.2-.82.44 1.1.16 1.92.08 2.12.51.56.82 1.27.82 2.15 0 3.07-1.87 3.75-3.65 3.95.29.25.54.73.54 1.48 0 1.07-.01 1.93-.01 2.2 0 .21.15.46.55.38A8.013 8.013 0 0 0 16 8c0-4.42-3.58-8-8-8Z"/></svg>
          GitHub
        </a>
        <a href="https://huggingface.co/nefelizafeiri" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Hugging Face">
          <span class="hf-emoji" aria-hidden="true">🤗</span>
          Hugging Face
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ TAB NAVIGATION ═══════════════ -->
<div class="tab-nav" id="tab-nav">
  <div class="tab-nav-inner">
    <a href="#education"  class="tab-link">Education</a>
    <a href="#experience" class="tab-link">Experience</a>
    <a href="#projects"   class="tab-link">Projects</a>
    <a href="#activities" class="tab-link">Activities</a>
    <a href="#skills"     class="tab-link">Skills</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ EDUCATION ═══════════════ -->
<div id="education" class="section-anchor">
<div class="section">
  <h2 class="section-title">Education</h2>

  <div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-header">
      <span class="entry-org">University of Miami Herbert Business School</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Master of Science in Business Analytics</span>
      <span class="entry-location">Coral Gables, FL</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-meta">
      <span class="entry-date">Expected May 2026</span>
    </div>
    <ul>
      <li><strong>Related Coursework:</strong> Quality Management, Supply Chain Analytics, Business Consulting Analytics, Product Management</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-header">
      <span class="entry-org">University of Central Oklahoma</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Bachelor of Business Administration in International Business &mdash; Minor in Finance</span>
      <span class="entry-location">Edmond, OK</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-meta">
      <span class="entry-date">May 2025</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ EXPERIENCE ═══════════════ -->
<div id="experience" class="section-anchor section-alt">
<div class="section">
  <h2 class="section-title">Experience</h2>

  <div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-header">
      <span class="entry-org">University of Miami</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Graduate Assistant</span>
      <span class="entry-location">Miami, FL</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-meta">
      <span class="entry-date">October 2025 – Present</span>
    </div>
    <ul>
      <li>Designed and built <strong>Ravix</strong>, the website for an open-source Python regression library accompanying a Springer-published textbook — responsible for design, content, and ongoing maintenance</li>
      <li>Completed an independent directed study supporting the professor's book project (research support, edits)</li>
      <li>Support a professor who oversees the MSBA program with undergraduate course assistance and student guidance</li>
      <li>Manage communications, follow-ups, and academic tasks to keep coursework and provide operational support</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-header">
      <span class="entry-org">University of Central Oklahoma — Athletic Department</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Finance Department Assistant</span>
      <span class="entry-location">Edmond, OK</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-meta">
      <span class="entry-date">August 2024 – May 2025</span>
    </div>
    <ul>
      <li>Identified budget inefficiencies that reduced unnecessary event costs and improved resource utilization</li>
      <li>Improved financial efficiency across athletic events by analyzing budget variances and supporting resource allocation</li>
      <li>Reduced budget adjustments by flagging potential issues earlier in the event planning cycle</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-header">
      <span class="entry-org">University of Central Oklahoma</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Research Assistant — National Conference Undergraduate Research</span>
      <span class="entry-location">Edmond, OK</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-meta">
      <span class="entry-date">March 2024 – April 2025</span>
    </div>
    <ul>
      <li>Achieved <strong>1st place at Oklahoma Research Day 2025</strong> for a regression-based analysis of natural gas price behavior</li>
      <li>Analyzed weather and forecast datasets in Excel to quantify their influence on natural gas price movements</li>
      <li>Interpreted analytical findings to support financial forecasting and inform energy market decision-making</li>
      <li>Developed predictive models using regression and time-series techniques to identify long-term market trends</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-header">
      <span class="entry-org">Zafeiris LTD (Beverage Distribution)</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Communication Specialist | Business Operations</span>
      <span class="entry-location">Athens, Greece</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-meta">
      <span class="entry-date">June 2020 – May 2025</span>
    </div>
    <ul>
      <li>Analyzed customer demand and product-mix trends to optimize inventory, shifting resources toward high-demand items and reducing low-performing SKUs</li>
      <li>Expanded brand visibility by <strong>25%</strong> by assisting with promotional campaigns and community events</li>
      <li>Negotiated pricing and delivery terms with suppliers and customers, improving cost efficiency and partnerships</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ PROJECTS ═══════════════ -->
<div id="projects" class="section-anchor section-alt">
<div class="section">
  <h2 class="section-title">Projects</h2>

  <a href="capstone.html" class="project-card-link">
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-card-top">
        <div>
          <span class="project-card-badge">Capstone · Deloitte · Jan 2026 – May 2026</span>
          <h3 class="project-card-title">AI-Driven Wildfire Risk Monitoring</h3>
          <p class="project-card-desc">Developing an AI solution for wildfire risk monitoring and early detection in collaboration with Deloitte, translating geospatial and environmental analytics into actionable insights for real-world decision-making.</p>
        </div>
        <span class="project-card-arrow">→</span>
      </div>
      <div class="project-card-tags">
        <span class="tag">Python</span>
        <span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
        <span class="tag">Geospatial Data</span>
        <span class="tag">Data Visualization</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <div class="project-card project-card-static project-card-featured">
    <div class="project-card-top">
      <div>
        <span class="project-card-badge badge-featured">★ First AI Model · Apr 2026</span>
        <h3 class="project-card-title">Chart Reasoner — Fine-tuned Phi-3 Mini</h3>
        <p class="project-card-desc">My first published AI model: a LoRA fine-tune of Microsoft's Phi-3 Mini (4k) for chart reasoning — extracting structured insights from chart images. Trained with Unsloth + TRL and released on the Hugging Face Hub as a component of the SQL Agent stack.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card-tags">
      <span class="tag">Phi-3 Mini</span>
      <span class="tag">LoRA</span>
      <span class="tag">Unsloth</span>
      <span class="tag">Transformers</span>
      <span class="tag">Hugging Face</span>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card-actions">
      <a href="https://huggingface.co/nefelizafeiri/chart-reasoner-phi3-mini-lora" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="action-btn action-btn-primary">
        <span aria-hidden="true">🤗</span> View on Hugging Face
      </a>
      <a href="https://huggingface.co/nefelizafeiri/chart-reasoner-phi3-mini-adapter-only" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="action-btn">
        <span aria-hidden="true">🤗</span> Adapter-only variant
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card project-card-static">
    <div class="project-card-top">
      <div>
        <span class="project-card-badge">Team Project · Apr 2026 · Hugging Face Spaces</span>
        <h3 class="project-card-title">SQL Agent — Natural Language to SQL</h3>
        <p class="project-card-desc">A multi-model AI agent that accepts a natural-language question, generates and executes the corresponding SQL query, and returns an interactive data visualization. Three open-source LLMs were fine-tuned on a 761K-row curated dataset for SQL generation, chart reasoning, and SVG rendering, then deployed end-to-end on Hugging Face Spaces.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card-tags">
      <span class="tag">LLMOps</span>
      <span class="tag">PyTorch</span>
      <span class="tag">LLM Fine-Tuning</span>
      <span class="tag">Hugging Face Spaces</span>
      <span class="tag">Python</span>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card-actions">
      <a href="https://huggingface.co/nefelizafeiri" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="action-btn action-btn-primary">
        <span aria-hidden="true">🤗</span> View on Hugging Face
      </a>
      <a href="https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/sql-agent-llmops" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="action-btn">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 0C3.58 0 0 3.58 0 8c0 3.54 2.29 6.53 5.47 7.59.4.07.55-.17.55-.38 0-.19-.01-.82-.01-1.49-2.01.37-2.53-.49-2.69-.94-.09-.23-.48-.94-.82-1.13-.28-.15-.68-.52-.01-.53.63-.01 1.08.58 1.23.82.72 1.21 1.87.87 2.33.66.07-.52.28-.87.51-1.07-1.78-.2-3.64-.89-3.64-3.95 0-.87.31-1.59.82-2.15-.08-.2-.36-1.02.08-2.12 0 0 .67-.21 2.2.82.64-.18 1.32-.27 2-.27.68 0 1.36.09 2 .27 1.53-1.04 2.2-.82 2.2-.82.44 1.1.16 1.92.08 2.12.51.56.82 1.27.82 2.15 0 3.07-1.87 3.75-3.65 3.95.29.25.54.73.54 1.48 0 1.07-.01 1.93-.01 2.2 0 .21.15.46.55.38A8.013 8.013 0 0 0 16 8c0-4.42-3.58-8-8-8Z"/></svg>
        View on GitHub
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card project-card-static">
    <div class="project-card-top">
      <div>
        <span class="project-card-badge">Big Data Analytics · Apr 2026</span>
        <h3 class="project-card-title">Coffee Shop Big Data Analytics</h3>
        <p class="project-card-desc">End-to-end big-data ML project on ~1.8M coffee-shop transactions. PySpark for ingest, cleaning, and EDA; scikit-learn + XGBoost + Optuna for modeling; SHAP for explainability. Delivered regression and classification models with clear lifts over baselines (wait time +34.8%, purchase amount +11.8%, rewards-target AUC 0.98).</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card-tags">
      <span class="tag">PySpark</span>
      <span class="tag">XGBoost</span>
      <span class="tag">Optuna</span>
      <span class="tag">SHAP</span>
      <span class="tag">scikit-learn</span>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card-actions">
      <a href="https://github.com/nefelizafeiri/Coffee_big_data_analytics_final_project" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="action-btn">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 0C3.58 0 0 3.58 0 8c0 3.54 2.29 6.53 5.47 7.59.4.07.55-.17.55-.38 0-.19-.01-.82-.01-1.49-2.01.37-2.53-.49-2.69-.94-.09-.23-.48-.94-.82-1.13-.28-.15-.68-.52-.01-.53.63-.01 1.08.58 1.23.82.72 1.21 1.87.87 2.33.66.07-.52.28-.87.51-1.07-1.78-.2-3.64-.89-3.64-3.95 0-.87.31-1.59.82-2.15-.08-.2-.36-1.02.08-2.12 0 0 .67-.21 2.2.82.64-.18 1.32-.27 2-.27.68 0 1.36.09 2 .27 1.53-1.04 2.2-.82 2.2-.82.44 1.1.16 1.92.08 2.12.51.56.82 1.27.82 2.15 0 3.07-1.87 3.75-3.65 3.95.29.25.54.73.54 1.48 0 1.07-.01 1.93-.01 2.2 0 .21.15.46.55.38A8.013 8.013 0 0 0 16 8c0-4.42-3.58-8-8-8Z"/></svg>
        View on GitHub
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="project-card project-card-static">
    <div class="project-card-top">
      <div>
        <span class="project-card-badge">Personal · Aug 2025 – Oct 2025</span>
        <h3 class="project-card-title">Python Budget App</h3>
        <p class="project-card-desc">Built a personal finance application featuring automated expense tracking, category analysis, and data visualizations to support budget planning and financial awareness.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card-tags">
      <span class="tag">Python</span>
      <span class="tag">Data Visualization</span>
      <span class="tag">Automation</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ ACTIVITIES & INTERESTS ═══════════════ -->
<div id="activities" class="section-anchor">
<div class="section">
  <h2 class="section-title">Activities &amp; Interests</h2>

  <div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-header">
      <span class="entry-org">Deloitte Scholar — DIRPA Program</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Deloitte Institute for Research &amp; Practice in Analytics</span>
      <span class="entry-location">Miami, FL</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-meta">
      <span class="entry-date">October 2025 – October 2026</span>
    </div>
    <ul>
      <li>Won a scholarship in data visualization demonstrating strength in analytics and business strategy</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-header">
      <span class="entry-org">Graduate Business Student Association</span>
      <span class="entry-role">MSBA Cohort Representative</span>
      <span class="entry-location">Miami, FL</span>
    </div>
    <ul>
      <li>Represent the MSBA program, supporting initiatives to improve student engagement and collaboration</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-header">
      <span class="entry-org">Varsity Tennis Team</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Student-Athlete</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-meta">
      <span class="entry-date">August 2021 – May 2025</span>
    </div>
    <ul>
      <li>Awarded Top-2 line-up positions throughout college tennis career while leading a team of 6–12 players</li>
      <li>Represented the university at major regional and national NCAA tournaments, competing against top-ranked athletes</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-header">
      <span class="entry-org">Student-Athlete Advisory Committee</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Member</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-meta">
      <span class="entry-date">August 2021 – May 2023</span>
    </div>
    <ul>
      <li>Organized and coordinated community service initiatives supporting student-athlete welfare</li>
      <li>Contributed to enhancements of Athletic Department programs for student-athletes</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-header">
      <span class="entry-org">International Children Games — Taipei, Taiwan</span>
      <span class="entry-role">National Tennis Team — Greece</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-meta">
      <span class="entry-date">July 2016</span>
    </div>
    <ul>
      <li>Represented Greece as a member of the National Tennis Team at an international multi-sport competition</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ SKILLS ═══════════════ -->
<div id="skills" class="section-anchor section-alt">
<div class="section">
  <h2 class="section-title">Skills</h2>

  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-card">
      <h4>Technical Skills</h4>
      <div class="tag-list">
        <span class="tag">Python</span>
        <span class="tag">SQL</span>
        <span class="tag">Tableau</span>
        <span class="tag">Power BI</span>
        <span class="tag">Microsoft Office Suite</span>
        <span class="tag">Minitab</span>
        <span class="tag">Visio</span>
        <span class="tag">Jira</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="skill-card">
      <h4>Languages</h4>
      <div class="tag-list">
        <span class="tag">Greek (Native)</span>
        <span class="tag">English (Fluent)</span>
        <span class="tag">French (Conversational)</span>
        <span class="tag">German (Conversational)</span>
        <span class="tag">Spanish (Basic)</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="skill-card">
      <h4>Certifications</h4>
      <div class="tag-list">
        <span class="tag">Six Sigma Green Belt</span>
        <span class="tag">PTR Tennis Coaching (Jan 2023)</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ FOOTER ═══════════════ -->
<div class="site-footer">
  <p>© 2026 Nefeli Zafeiri &nbsp;·&nbsp;
     <a href="mailto:nefelizafeiri@gmail.com">Email</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
     <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nefeli-zafeiri" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
     <a href="https://github.com/nefelizafeiri" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
     <a href="https://huggingface.co/nefelizafeiri" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Hugging Face</a>
  </p>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ TAB ACTIVE STATE SCRIPT ═══════════════ -->
<script>
(function () {
  const tabLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-link');
  const sectionIds = ['education', 'experience', 'projects', 'activities', 'skills'];

  function setActive(id) {
    tabLinks.forEach(function(link) {
      link.classList.toggle('active', link.getAttribute('href') === '#' + id);
    });
  }

  // IntersectionObserver to highlight active section tab
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
    entries.forEach(function(entry) {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        setActive(entry.target.id);
      }
    });
  }, { rootMargin: '-30% 0px -60% 0px' });

  sectionIds.forEach(function(id) {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) observer.observe(el);
  });

  // Set initial active on page load
  setActive('education');
})();
</script>
```
